examples: They also need better public relations skills than their predecessors, as the costs of even a minor slipup can be significant.
Someone made a slipup in the printed program.
Don't allow one slipup, or setback from the outside, influence you to erase all the progress you've made.
And it doesn't help that there are millions of crazed fans ready to pounce on the slightest slipup.
Was that just a slipup or is it kind of a sign that you guys are sort of easing your references to the name?
